recommendations.title: John Tucker Must Die
recommendations.overview: After discovering they are all dating the same same guy, three popular students from different cliques band together for revenge, so they enlist the help of a new gal in town and conspire to break the jerk's heart, while destroying his reputation.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Dance Academy: The Movie
recommendations.overview: This 2017 movie follows the original dance academy TV show and tracks where the characters are in their lives now.

recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: A Not So Merry Christmas
recommendations.overview: A curse is placed on grinchy Chuy, who wakes up to find he's lived a full year, but is doomed to remember only Christmas Day. Every year. From now on.
